text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Benefits Screening * Older Adult/Aging Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disability Benefit Recipients Older Adult/Aging Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIONAL COUNCIL ON AGING BENEFITSCHECKUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The BenefitsCheckup assists in determining eligibility for food, prescription, health care, utility assistance, and other benefit programs 251 18th Street S Suite 500 Arlington, VA 22202 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 5am-4pm Email (800) 794-6559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
